ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "first_author" TEXT /* First author of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the study */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the Curve (AUC) of the study */,
  "calibration" TEXT /* Calibration status of the study data (Yes/No) */,
  "relatedness" TEXT /* Relatedness of the study samples (e.g., Closely Related, Distantly Related) */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  "design" TEXT /* Design of the study (e.g., Randomized Controlled Trial, Observational) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., Recruiting, Completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Funding source of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_first_author FOREIGN KEY ("first_author") REFERENCES researchers ("last_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies_researchers" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study (e.g., Principal Investigator, Co-Investigator) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Contribution of the researcher to the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_researchers_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., Clinical, Laboratory) */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "license" TEXT /* License of the dataset (e.g., CC-BY, CC0) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the publication is based on */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "pmid" TEXT /* PubMed ID (PMID) of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the funding agency is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_funding" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency */,
  "award_number" TEXT /* Award number of the funding */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_funding_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_funding_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data calibration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the calibration was performed */,
  "calibration_method" TEXT /* Method used for calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_calibrations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "collaborator_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaborator */,
  "collaborator_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the collaborator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
